manual.title: Connect to the Tabulate add-on
manual.description: Could not auto-detect the Tabulate add-on. Enter the host and port where its API is reachable.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Tabulate add-on.

add_receipt.name: Add receipt
add_receipt.description: Upload a scanned receipt image to the Tabulate add-on for OCR + AI extraction and categorization.

image_base64.name: Image (base64)
image_base64.description: A single receipt image, base64-encoded. Accepts JPEG, PNG, WEBP, TIFF, HEIC, or PDF up to 20 MB. A data: URI prefix is tolerated. Provide this or images_base64.

images_base64.name: Images (base64 list)
images_base64.description: A list of base64-encoded images to add as separate receipts in one call. Use this instead of image_base64 when a scan produced multiple images.

filename.name: File name
filename.description: File name to send with the upload.

store_name_hint.name: Store name hint
store_name_hint.description: Optional hint to help identify the store on the receipt.

wait_for_processing.name: Wait for processing
wait_for_processing.description: When on, the action holds the request open until Tabulate finishes and returns the parsed receipt. Turn this off from callers with a short timeout (e.g. Apple Shortcuts) to return immediately and process the receipt in the background.
